channel.title: Dan Patrick Show (Filtered)
channel.description: Daily DP Show episodes without C&R or Best Of clips.
channel.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 3 – Bam Deserves More Credit, Dianna Russini
item.description:
Dan thinks Bam Adebayo’s 83-point game should be celebrated and doesn’t deserve an asterisk. The Athletic senior NFL insider and the co-host of the Scoop City Podcast with Chase Daniel joins the show and thinks the Ravens rejecting Maxx Crosby seems sus.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 2 – Italy Beats Team USA, Jason Jackson
item.description:
Dan and the Danettes discuss the loss for Team USA to Italy in the World Baseball Classic. Miami Heat Radio and TV host Jason Jackson Joins the show to talk about Bam Adebayo's record-breaking game and what it meant for the entire team.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 1 – Bam Adebayo Drops 83, Maxx Crosby Out/Trey Hendrickson In
item.description:
Dan and the Danettes dissect Bam Adebayo’s 83-point game last night against the Wizards. And more NFL breaking news hits the Dan Patrick Show as the Baltimore Ravens sign a 4-year deal with DE Trey Hendrickson after backing out of the Maxx Crosby trade.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 3 – College Name Changes, Choo-Choo Train
item.description:
Dan shows off his knowledge of collegiate athletics as they discuss some smaller schools who have changed their name and/or mascots as we approach the Madness. And Dan gets in touch with his inner grandpa.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 2 – Italian Americans on Team Italy, Maxx Crosby Questions
item.description:
Is there an issue with the number of Americans on Team Italy for the World Baseball Classic? With Maxx Crosby back with the Raiders and a price point set, Dan wonders if anyone can put together an acceptable package for the Vegas edge rusher.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 1 – Bam’s Big Night Criticized, Ross Tucker
item.description:
Dan and the Danettes discuss Bam Adebayo’s 83-point game against the Wizards as criticism of his historic accomplishment continues to run rampant. As always – what about Wilt? Former NFL lineman and current analyst, Ross Tucker shares his own experience failing medicals while discussing the thorny situation with Maxx Crosby, plus he breaks down Kyler Murray’s signing with the Vikings.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 3 – Bam Adebayo, Jim Boeheim
item.description:
Miami Heat star Bam Adebayo discusses his historic 83-point performance and says he thinks Kobe would have had no problem with his eclipsing 81. 47-year Syracuse Men’s Head Basketball Coach Jim Boeheim shares the truth behind the new NIL reality and believes in just letting players shoot. 

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 2 – Seth Greenberg, Oscars Odds
item.description:
College hoops insider Seth Greenberg drops by as we approach Selection Sunday and the NCAA Men’s Basketball Tournament. Plus, The Academy Awards are on Sunday and DP check the odds on his favorite movies.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 1 – Meat Friday, Kyler Murray in Minnesota
item.description:
Dan and the Danettes are celebrating a Meat Friday curated by Dylan the Graphics Guy. And Dan thinks there is definitely potential for Kyler Murray with the Vikings in Minnesota but it all rests on Murray’s commitment.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 3 – Lakers Big Win, Nischelle Turner and Kevin Frazier
item.description:
Dan isn’t sold on the Lakers even after their big overtime win over the Nuggets yesterday. And Entertainment Tonight co-hosts Nischelle Turner and Kevin Frazier stop by discuss the biggest storylines from the Oscars last night, and debate whether there could be some Timothee Chalamet fatigue.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 2 – Chalk Talk, Jay Bilas
item.description:
Dan thinks we’re going to see fewer upsets in the NCAA Tourney in the NIL era now that schools are paying their players. And get your brackets out as March Madness guru Jay Bilas drops by with everything you need to know.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 1 – Brackets Are Set, Bruce Pearl
item.description:
Dan and the Danettes are ready for the Madness now that the brackets are set and they talk about the most interesting developments and reactions. And former Auburn HC Bruce Pearl drops by to defend his objectivity in the broadcast booth.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 3 – John Smoltz, Reggie Miller
item.description:
Hall of Fame P John Smoltz joins the show to preview tonight’s World Baseball Classic between Team USA and Venezuela. And Hall of Fame hooper Reggie Miller stops in to share his personal recollections from his time playing in the Tourney.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 2 – One Dining Moment, Carlos Boozer
item.description:
Fritzy gets loose as Dan and the Danettes celebrate his rendition of “One Dining Moment” and some of his other vocal performances over the years. And former Duke star and current analyst Carlos Boozer drops by to talk about the Madness and his sons following in his footsteps at Duke.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 1 – First Four, WBC, Shenanigans
item.description:
Dan and the Danettes are prepared for shenanigans on this St. Patrick’s Day. Everyone has their heads buried in bracketology as the First Four gets underway tonight. And they weigh in on the upcoming World Baseball Classic Final between Team USA and Venezuela.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 3 - NFL Draft Conundrum, All-Time NCAA Starting 5
item.description:
Dan Patrick explains why teams should not feel forced to draft a quarterback high if they don't fully believe in the QB. Dan explores what his all-time NCAA starting 5 would be. Plus, is the World Baseball Classic truly bigger than the World Series?

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 2 - Nick Wright, Unretiring Jerseys
item.description:
"First Things First" co-host Nick Wright gives his all-time college basketball starting 5 and shares the story behind the biggest gambling loss in his life. They also discuss USC asking Matt Leinart to unretire his jersey.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 1 - Venezuela Wins World Baseball Classic
item.description:
Dan Patrick reacts to Venezuela winning the World Baseball Classic and analyzes all the moments that led to United States' loss. Dan compares Bryce Harper's game-tying home run to other amazing moments in losing championship efforts. Plus, Dan discusses the cultural impact of the World Baseball Classic and questions if it will lose its luster in moving its schedule for the Olympics.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 3 – Mancave Vandalism, Disappointment Draft
item.description:
Dan and the Danettes get to the bottom of the mystery of the broken Sammy Sosa statue in the mancave. Plus, they hold a “Disappointment Draft” for their brackets with each selecting the team they expect to disappoint them during the tourney.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 2 – Cade Cunningham Collapsed Lung, Tracy McGrady
item.description:
Pistons star Cade Cunningham has a collapsed lung, putting their prowess on ice for a while. Basketball Hall of Famer and NBA analyst Tracy McGrady answers whether he thinks Steph Curry ruined basketball or not, talks about whether he could hit 80 points (and if others in the NBA right now could do it), and how he’s fighting to add one-on-one basketball for the NBA All-Star Weekend.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 1 – Let the Madness Begin, Lakers Looking Dangerous
item.description:
It’s all about the brackets as March Madness gets underway this morning and Dan and the Danettes are here for it. Plus, the Lakers seem to be finding their rotation with Austin Reeves and Lebron James and they’re starting to look dangerous.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 3 – Remembering Chuck Norris
item.description:
Chuck Norris passes away on Friday. Dan and the Danettes pay tribute to the actor and legend. The Danettes learn a lot about Chuck Norris from his history and those who went to his martial arts classes, and callers share their memories too. The feud between Dan and Marvin continues over the best center in college basketball.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 2 - No good jobs in college basketball, Jon Rothstein
item.description:
College basketball writer Jon Rothstein joins Dan to talk about the first round of the NCAA Tournament, from first round upsets to Siena’s close chance to take down Duke. Dan wonders if Syracuse is still a good job, or if BC is a good job – or if many of the prestigious positions are still that in the new landscape of collegiate sports. Dylan unveils some of his bets and parlays he’s making around the Tournament. Plus, an update on the Disappointment Draft.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 1 - Round 1 Upsets, Adam Lefkoe
item.description:
Dan reacts to the major win for High Point over Wisconsin as the small school in North Carolina picks up their first NCAA Tournament win. Schools like High Point want to schedule tougher opponents during the season but they can’t get anyone to play them. Marvin is back from suspension. TNT Sports host Adam Lefkoe joins Dan to talk about covering the tournament and the odd and bizarre games he plays with Shaq on the set and during his podcast.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 3 – Saving Cinderella, Best and Worst of the Weekend
item.description:
Reports that Cinderella is dead may be an overreaction, but Dan suggests some adjustments to collegiate athletics that might keep her around a little longer. Plus, Dan and the Danettes share their best and worst from an eventful weekend.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 2 – Everybody Needs a Sugar Daddy, Charles Barkley
item.description:
Dan talks about all the money flooding into college sports and how important it has become to have a ready source of funds to stay competitive in today’s NIL world. And legendary basketball analyst Charles Barkley swing by to share his unique opinions on this year’s version of March Madness.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 1 – Sweet Sixteen Is Set, JSN Gets Paid
item.description:
Dan and the Danettes recap the first two rounds of the NCAA Men’s Basketball Tournament and the changing landscape of college athletics. Plus, DP weighs in on Seattle Seahawks WR Jaxon Smith-Njigba’s new record-setting contract.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 3 – DP Loves Callers, Reggie Miller
item.description:
Dan reminds us why he takes calls on his show when so many others refuse to talk to their fans directly about their own opinions. Basketball Hall of Famer Reggie Miller gives his thoughts on the Wemby MVP debate and shares what the transition from college to the NBA is like. 

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 2 – NFL Draft QB Questions, Clark Kellogg
item.description:
While most agree that Fernando Mendoza is the clear favorite to be drafted first in the upcoming NFL Draft, DP reacts to Dan Orlovsky’s contention that it should actually be Ty Simpson. And college hoops analyst Clark Kellogg drops by to talk some Sweet 16.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 1 – Wemby’s Coming Out Party, Women’s Tourney Controversy
item.description:
Victor Wembanyama had another dominating performance last night and DP makes a case for him to be legitimately considered for the NBA MVP Award this season. And there is controversy at the NCAA Women’s Basketball Tournament where UCONN continues its dominance.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick
